rationale: Completion lens — round-2 fix does not disturb my round-1 conclusions. (1) Divergence still passes: the 4-file r2 diff touches only workflow-owned paths — internal/ownership/populate{,_test}.go and plugins/mindspec/{README,FINDINGS}.md both match workflow/OWNERSHIP.yaml globs (internal/ownership/**, plugins/mindspec/**). No unowned path introduced; the .md files are docs (isDocFile), the .go is owned+covered. Bead 6's complete runs only CheckADRDivergence and bead→spec stays flat→flat — guard passes. (2) Spec is MORE complete: plugin README/FINDINGS now show .mindspec/specs/ + co-located <spec-dir>/reviews/; AC17 stale-path grep over both files is EMPTY. DomainsNeedingPopulate now reads workspace.DomainsDir (flat-first) and TestDomainsNeedingPopulate_FlatTree passes, pinning both tiers. (3) Round-1 work undisturbed: clean flat tree (.mindspec/{adr,core,domains,specs}, no .mindspec/docs/), build/vet clean, ownership+doctor+validate suites all green. The 2 pre-existing failures live in other packages. Nothing in the r2 fix would choke final-review or the impl-approve flat→canonical migration. Ready for final-review + PR.

findings.issue: plugins/mindspec/README.md + FINDINGS.md re-flattened to .mindspec/specs/<spec-id>/ with co-located <spec-dir>/reviews/ (prep + panel rounds). AC17 stale-path grep over both files (.mindspec/docs/specs, repo-root review/) returns ZERO hits; flat layout strings present and annotated 'spec 106 / ADR-0039'. Both paths attribute to the workflow domain, so complete-time divergence is unaffected.

populate.go:71 now resolves the enumeration root via workspace.DomainsDir(root) (flat-first precedence) instead of hardcoded filepath.Join(root,'.mindspec','docs','domains'). TestDomainsNeedingPopulate_FlatTree proves it returns [absent stub] on a born-flat tree (was zero under flat-blindness); the canonical-tier test still passes, pinning both tiers. go build/vet clean; the workflow-owned source change keeps every r2 path owned.

Worktree HEAD is c08e7e45, tree clean. Flat tree confirmed (.mindspec/{adr,core,domains,specs,...}, no .mindspec/docs/). go test ./internal/ownership/... ./internal/doctor/... ./internal/validate/... all OK. The 2 known pre-existing failures (TestRun_IdleNoBeads z4ps cwd-leak, harness TestInstructPhaseDetection) live outside these packages and are layout-independent — unchanged by bead 6. Spec branch after Bead 6 merges is a clean flat tree ready for final-review.
